space.$description: 4px base unit. Balanced tier for component-internal spacing, extended with larger stops (80/96/128) for the marketing site's generous section-level rhythm — a deliberate mixed-density choice. Keys follow the px/4 convention (space.4 = 16px).

layout.$description: Semantic aliases for the three most consequential layout decisions.

page-gutter.$description: Horizontal padding on page-level containers (matches existing px-6)

section-gap.$description: Vertical padding between major page sections (matches existing py-24)

component-gap.$description: Default gap between adjacent components in a stack or row
